# .gen — Generated Files

**Do NOT edit files in this directory.**

These files are auto-generated by Constructor Studio during
`cfs init`, `cfs kit install`, or `cfs update`.

Contents:

- `SKILL.md` — aggregated skill navigation (routes to per-kit skills)
- `AGENTS.md` — generated agent navigation rules
- `README.md` — this file

Per-kit files are in `config/kits/{slug}/`.
To update: `cfs update` or `cfs kit update`.
Any manual changes to generated files **will be overwritten** on the next update.
